avoid_when: GPU memory cannot sustain the generated batch size or the images contain little fine detail.

evidence.note: DINOv2 uses a patch size of 14; 336 pixels preserves an integer 24 by 24 patch grid and more breed morphology than 224.

risk: Training and inference cost grow quadratically with image resolution.
summary: Train fine-grained dog breed classification at 336 resolution to preserve subtle face, coat, ear, and body-shape evidence for lower log loss.
use_when: The 224-pixel model confuses visually similar breeds.
